The best president ever! Never will be another like him. Please we all must unite and put the infighting causing division aside. We must stand by Trump through thick and thin. Couldn't wait to go to work and see all the liberals with a huge smile on my face.

We must pray every day without ceasing for the protection of our president, for us to win the midterms so we can complete our mission to where no democrat communist can ever win the presidency again.
